utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But I do not . Me , Phoebe .

utterances.speaker: Roger
utterances.text: Well , I am not I am not at all surprised they feel that way .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You are not ? See , that is why you are so great !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am not at all surprised they feel that way .

utterances.speaker: Roger
utterances.text: Actually it is , it is quite , you know , typical behaviour when you have this kind of dysfunctional group dynamic .

utterances.speaker: Roger
utterances.text: You know , this kind of co ... dependant , emotionally stunted , sitting in your stupid coffee house with your stupid big cups ... which , I am sorry , might as well have nipples on them , and you are all like Oh , define me ! Define me ! Love me , I need love ! .
